headline: Policy blitz targets consumption and risk: railway-tourism synergy, PE fund clampdown
headline_zh: 政策组合拳促消费防风险：铁路旅游融合、私募基金监管
narrative: Today’s policy agenda signals a dual focus: boosting domestic demand through cross-sector integration (railway + tourism) while tightening oversight on private equity, as outlined by the CSRC. Meanwhile, the '15th Five-Year' propaganda campaign kicks off, framing the period as foundational for modernization. On the external front, Cuba’s countermeasures against US pressure and the Taiwan Affairs Office presser underscore Beijing’s consistent messaging on sovereignty.
narrative_zh: 今日政策议程显示双重焦点：通过跨部门融合（铁路+旅游）刺激内需，同时证监会收紧私募股权监管。与此同时，“十五五”宣传启动，将该时期定位为现代化的奠基阶段。外部方面，古巴应对美国压力的举措及国台办发布会凸显北京在主权问题上的一贯立场。
